claim: No custom Matrix Core speedup is claimed. The scalar HIP baseline passed for 256x256x256 on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, but the optimized rocWMMA path could not be built because rocwmma/rocwmma.hpp was unavailable in the Windows ROCm venv.
expected_profiler_signals: MFMA/Matrix Core instruction utilization after rocWMMA builds
hipBLASLt or Composable Kernel baseline comparison
curation_note: build-blocked: keep this as dependency evidence only. Install or expose rocWMMA headers/libraries, then rerun the optimized kernel and a hipBLASLt or Composable Kernel baseline before creating a timing-only or counter-backed Matrix Core optimization claim.
